title: LSN dura pack Diamond
description: This is a durapack made for lsn
body:
This is a dura pack made to be compatable with the [Kaesitius Custompack V2](https://modrinth.com/project/C2STUvua). We made this pack because we noticed, that other dura packs arent compatable with the custom pack. So we fixed it and released **LSN dura pack**


if you need help, feel free to contact us on our [discord server](https://discord.gg/95VdgjRvm2)
